phone_presence_notes: Patient and professional through a long, interrupted 38-minute call but never used the customer's name and warmth was inconsistent throughout.
top_strength: Exceptional flexibility on a complex multi-leg move — broke down packing, local, and long-distance pricing across multiple day options without losing the customer.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass completely absent and 3 key differentiators skipped — those are automatic points requiring only 60 seconds.
